home.hero: Learn grammar through the world's greatest books
home.description: Discover grammar rules illustrated by real excerpts from classic and contemporary fiction.

categories.title: Grammar Categories
categories.subtitle: Choose a section and jump to specific rules.

rules.title: Grammar Rules
rules.subtitle: Choose a rule and learn it through literary excerpts.

progress.title: My Progress
progress.byCategoryHint: Share of rules marked completed within each grammar category.
progress.overallHint: Completed rules out of all rules tracked in your progress.

favourites.title: My Favourites
favourites.booksSectionHint: Admin imports books from Gutenberg first, then you can add them to favourites here.
favourites.noExcerptsForSelectedBook: No excerpts for the selected book yet.

catalog.title: Book Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Search books, add them to catalog, and save useful excerpts to favourites.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.booksIsbnHint: ISBN lookup only fills the form from Open Library. Save the book here, then link excerpts to this book in Excerpts — that is how search and favourites use the title, author, and cover.
admin.popularLanguagesHint: Ranked by learning activity (progress records). If there is no activity yet, the list shows languages by number of grammar rules.
admin.completionByCategoryHint: Among all learners: completed rule progress entries vs total progress entries per category.
admin.noProgressYet: No learning progress in the database yet — stats will appear after users study rules.
admin.progressAcrossUsersHint: Distribution of all user_progress rows by status.
admin.recentRegistrationsHint: Users registered in the last 30 days.
